quote: Books are the basis; purity is the force; preaching is the essence; utility is the principle.

The beginning of all knowledge comes from humility.

Sincerity is the only qualification for spiritual advancement.

Simple living and high thinking should be our motto.

The more you give to Krishna, the more you become enriched.
